hypothesis: The best so far is exp_0027 with num_leaves=256 (WRMSSE=0.94675). exp_0028 tried num_leaves=512 with stronger regularization but was slightly worse (0.94697). Now testing whether reducing learning_rate from 0.05 to 0.03 with num_leaves=256 and more estimators (up to 800 with early stopping) improves generalization. Lower learning rate often leads to better optima when tree complexity is fixed. All other settings unchanged from exp_0027 (num_leaves=256, min_child_samples=50, lambda_l2=0.1).
